name: ComfyUI Companion Executor
description: Routes prompt intent to the best ComfyUI pack, asks for missing details, submits a workflow to ComfyUI, polls completion, and returns inline image markdown with download links.
author: comfyui-flux2

userRequest.description: Natural language request from the user.

workflowApiJson.description: ComfyUI API workflow JSON string. Supports placeholders __PROMPT__, __NEGATIVE__, __SOURCE_IMAGE_URL__ in string fields.

taskType.description: Optional explicit task type: t2i or edit.

sourceImageUrl.description: Optional source image URL/path for edit jobs.

preferInlineImage.description: True to prefer markdown inline image output.

cachedInstalledPacks.description: Optional JSON array string from RAG memory for confirmed installed pack selectors.

examples.prompt: Generate a photoreal product image and run it now.
examples.call: {"userRequest":"Generate a photoreal product image and run it now.","taskType":"t2i","workflowApiJson":"{\"3\":{\"inputs\":{\"text\":\"__PROMPT__\"},\"class_type\":\"CLIPTextEncode\"}}"}

examples.prompt: Edit this image to remove clutter and execute.
examples.call: {"userRequest":"Edit this image to remove clutter and execute.","taskType":"edit","sourceImageUrl":"https://example.com/in.png","workflowApiJson":"{\"3\":{\"inputs\":{\"text\":\"__PROMPT__\"},\"class_type\":\"CLIPTextEncode\"},\"12\":{\"inputs\":{\"image\":\"__SOURCE_IMAGE_URL__\"},\"class_type\":\"LoadImage\"}}"}
